description: §38.13.4 — a V5-strict synced cell (`<localCount> = 0`) declared inside a read-only `watches=` channel body fires E-CHANNEL-WATCHES-CLIENT-WRITE. A `watches=` feed is one-way server->client (§38.13.4) — it has no bidirectional §38.4 sync path.
rationale: §38.13.4: a `watches=` channel SHALL NOT declare V5-strict synced cells (or any client->server write path) in its body; apply changes to program-scope cells from `<onchange>` instead. A synced-cell declaration SHALL emit E-CHANNEL-WATCHES-CLIENT-WRITE.
